Deprecated API

Contents
  • Deprecated Methods
  • Deprecated Constructors
Deprecated Methods
com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize.getBitonalCompression()
          Deprecated in Version 4.6. Use PdfOptimize.getBitonalCompressions() instead. 
com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize.getColorCompression()
          Deprecated in Version 4.6. Use PdfOptimize.getContinuousCompressions() instead. 
com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize.getCompressionQuality()
          Use PdfOptimize.getImageQuality() instead. 
com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize.getImageStratConserv()
          Deprecated in Version 4.7. Get the switch for the conservative image processing strategy: Only try re-compressing an image if it has either been clipped ( PdfOptimize.setClipImages(boolean)), re-sampled ( PdfOptimize.setResolutionDPI(float), PdfOptimize.setThresholdDPI(float)), or if it has undergone a color conversion (PdfOptimize.setColorConversion(int)), or if PdfOptimize.setForceRecompression(boolean) is enabled. Otherwise the original input image is taken as is. 
com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize.getMonochromeCompression()
          Deprecated in Version 4.6. Use PdfOptimize.getContinuousCompressions() instead. 
com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize.getRemoveNonSymbolicFonts()
          Deprecated in Version 4.7. 
com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize.renameFont(String, String)
            
com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize.setBitonalCompression(int)
          Deprecated in Version 4.6. Use PdfOptimize.setBitonalCompressions(int) instead. 
com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize.setColorCompression(int)
          Deprecated in Version 4.6. Use PdfOptimize.setContinuousCompressions(int) instead. 
com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize.setCompressionQuality(int)
          Use PdfOptimize.setImageQuality(int) instead. 
com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize.setImageStratConserv(boolean)
          Deprecated in Version 4.7. Set the switch for the conservative image processing strategy: Only try re-compressing an image if it has either been clipped ( PdfOptimize.setClipImages(boolean)), re-sampled ( PdfOptimize.setResolutionDPI(float), PdfOptimize.setThresholdDPI(float)), or if it has undergone a color conversion ( PdfOptimize.setColorConversion(int)), or if PdfOptimize.setForceRecompression(boolean) is enabled. Otherwise the original input image is taken as is. 
com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize.setMonochromeCompression(int)
          Deprecated in Version 4.6. Use PdfOptimize.setContinuousCompressions(int) instead. 
com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize.setRemoveNonSymbolicFonts(boolean)
          Deprecated in Version 4.7. 
 

Deprecated Constructors
com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize(byte[], String)
          Deprecated in Version 4.7. Use PdfOptimize.PdfOptimize() and PdfOptimize.openMem(byte[], String) instead. 
com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize(String, String)
          Deprecated in Version 4.7. Use PdfOptimize.PdfOptimize() and PdfOptimize.open(String, String) instead.
